scripts.build: npm run --workspace backend build && npm run --workspace web build
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test: npm run --workspace backend build && node --test _test_/*.test.mjs && npm run --workspace backend test
scripts.lint: npm run --workspace backend lint && npm run --workspace web lint
